versions.title: Starter words, auto-lock, numbers, tashkeel picker (WIP — bundles with dictionary upgrade for v1.0)
items: Starter words: the empty-widget view now shows your go-to phrases. ↵ pastes, Tab seeds a sentence so you can keep typing.
Auto-engage word lock: highlight a committed word to edit it and your previous letter-pick choices come back automatically — no more re-pressing Cmd+G.
Numbers convert to Arabic-Indic: type 2026 → ٢٠٢٦. Press Tab on the suggestion to keep the English form. Single bare digits (3, 7) still mean ع / ح.
Two-letter Cmd+G: select two adjacent letters in the input before opening the picker to pick alternates for both at once.
Tashkeel picker: Cmd+T (Ctrl+T) on a letter shows all diacritic options — fatha, kasra, damma, sukun, shadda combos, tanween.

versions.title: Letter picker — swap a single Arabic letter without retyping
items: Press <kbd>Cmd</kbd>+<kbd>G</kbd> (or <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>G</kbd>) on a suggestion to open a letter picker.
Pick a different Arabic letter for any ambiguous Latin consonant (z → ز/ظ/ذ, t → ت/ط/ث, etc.).
Use <kbd>Tab</kbd> to cycle between letter positions, arrows to choose, <kbd>Enter</kbd> to apply.
Your choice is locked to the suggestion and survives further edits to the rest of the word.
Confirmed picks are remembered, so next time the right spelling shows up first.
